$comment: add_file: create a NEW C++ file in the active workspace project. Plan which KBs the file needs, generate it (grounded in the chosen KBs), stage+build the WHOLE project (cl, the oracle), repair up to twice (grounded in the MSVC error docs), then register it. proj = $workspace; path + request from $input (head/tail).
summary: Add a new C++ file/class/feature to the active workspace project; rebuild the whole project to verify, repair up to twice, and record it.
